candidate_materials.name: Pester
candidate_materials.provenance: Open-source PowerShell test and mock framework maintained in the pester GitHub organization.
candidate_materials.license_or_terms: Apache-2.0 declared in repository license; owner/legal review still required before trusted use.
candidate_materials.risk_notes: Would add a test framework dependency if adopted. Requires version pinning, PowerShell compatibility review, and quarantine smoke test.
candidate_materials.intended_use: Future PowerShell module/runtime tests for Builder operations.

candidate_materials.name: PSScriptAnalyzer
candidate_materials.provenance: Microsoft PowerShell GitHub project for static analysis of PowerShell modules and scripts.
candidate_materials.license_or_terms: MIT License declared in repository; owner/legal review still required before trusted use.
candidate_materials.risk_notes: Would add static analysis rules and possible false positives. Requires pinned version, local smoke test, and rule scope decision.
candidate_materials.intended_use: Future PowerShell quality gate for modules and orchestrator scripts.

candidate_materials.name: Syft
candidate_materials.provenance: Anchore open-source CLI tool and Go library for generating Software Bills of Materials.
candidate_materials.license_or_terms: Apache-2.0 indicated by repository metadata; owner/legal review still required before trusted use.
candidate_materials.risk_notes: CLI introduces binary/toolchain risk. Requires checksum/provenance review, pinned version, offline smoke, and no automatic install.
candidate_materials.intended_use: Future SBOM generation operation for Builder repo and generated assets.

candidate_materials.name: JSON Schema official reference
candidate_materials.provenance: Official JSON Schema website and documentation ecosystem.
candidate_materials.license_or_terms: REFERENCE_ONLY; terms/license to be reviewed before copying any content or adopting tooling.
candidate_materials.risk_notes: Useful as a schema reference, not executable material. Do not vendor text or tools without separate license review.
candidate_materials.intended_use: Future schema design reference for material catalog, operation contracts, and proof/report validation.
